case_title: COUNTY OF SONOMA VS. CALIFORNIA INTEGRATED WASTE MANAGEMENT BOARD

docket_entries.description: BOTH PLAINTIFF--COUNTY OF SONOMA AND DEFENDANT--CALIFORNIA INTEGRATED WASTE MANAGEMENT BOARD ARE EXEMPT FROM FILING FEES
REGISTER OF ACTION FILINGS FROM COUNTY OF SONOMA FROM 8/22/07 TO 10/26/07. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
CHECK CASE FILE CGC-07-469331 FOR APPENDIX OF EXHIBITS TO COMPLAINT VOLUMES 1,2,3 AND 4.

COMPLEX DESIGNATION GRANTED. SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-24-2008 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 305. APR-18-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. PARTIES REPORT ACTION TENTATIVELY SETTLED, AND FURTHER PROCEEDINGS STAYED BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: JOHN MUNTER; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA (305)
